# Group 24/7 Worldwide (G247) — full reference

> Integrated creative and production studio. "Perfect design, flawless execution" across the full brand journey — from packaging on the shelf to campaigns on the screen. Founded 2006 in Sydney; now AI-empowered. Senior-led, deliberately lean, global team across Sydney, Manila, Bangkok and Shanghai. Strong in regulated industries (pharmaceutical, finance, insurance). Core promise of "True Value" — senior expertise and world-class execution at a cost larger agencies cannot match.

## Positioning
- Heritage + AI: two decades of production craft, now AI-empowered.
- Global team: AU / PH / TH / CN — multi-market, multi-language, multi-timezone.
- Full brand journey: packaging shelf to digital screen.
- Regulated-industry expertise: pharma, finance, insurance.
- True Value: smarter, faster, and more cost-effective than big agencies.

## Practices
1. Packaging — structural + graphic packaging; pharma compliance (TGA/FDA/EMA); range/dieline design; premium finishes; multi-market rollout; artwork management.
2. Point of Sale — POS displays (FSDU, gondola ends, counter units); in-store signage; retail environments; vendor management; roll-out kits; sustainable specs.
3. Digital — GEO-first websites; Core Web Vitals performance; microsites & campaigns; design systems; headless CMS (WordPress, Sanity, Contentful); AI-assisted dev.
4. Advertising & Collateral — campaign concepts; print collateral; OOH & print media; social campaigns; sales enablement; brand systems.
5. eDetailers — Veeva CRM-ready pharma eDetailers; MLR/PromoMats approval-ready; modular multi-language content; analytics tagging; productised pricing.

## eDetailer pricing (productised)
- Standard — from $14k/module: up to 12 screens, Veeva-ready build, 2 revision rounds, 6-week turnaround.
- Launch — from $34k/module: up to 28 screens + motion, modular library, multi-market adaptation, Veeva analytics tagging, 4 revision rounds.
- Global — quoted (5+ markets): master + 5+ locales, local-language QA, reviewer comms support, asset library + governance.

## Operating values
- Precision — held to the standard clients hire us for.
- Innovation — AI and emerging tech adopted as a responsibility.
- Partnership — an embedded extension of our clients' teams.
- Integrity — honest advice, responsible technology use, transparent AI usage.
- Agility — lean structure and global team for speed across markets and timezones.
- True Value — more for less; senior expertise at a cost bigger agencies can't match.

## Heritage timeline
- 2006 — Founded in Sydney as a production-first design studio.
- 2012 — Manila production office opens; always-on delivery begins.
- 2018 — Pharma practice scales; regulated content becomes core.
- 2024 — Productised Veeva-ready eDetailer offer launches.
- 2026 — AI-assisted delivery core to every practice; GEO-first web rebuild.

## Offices
- Sydney (AU) — HQ, strategy, account.
- Manila (PH) — production, engineering.
- Bangkok (TH) — production, artwork.
- Shanghai (CN) — local exec, translation.

## Differentiators (quotable)
- 20+ years of practice.
- 4 offices, one team — always-on across timezones.
- 12 languages delivered.
- ~40% faster than market via AI-assisted draft + senior review.
